EditTextPreference.title: Flex Web Service Token
EditTextPreference.dialogMessage: Enter the Flex Web Service token from your Interactive Brokers account. You can find it in IBKR Mobile →Trade Reports ("Perfomance & Reports" in Web Client Portal) → Third-Party Reports → \u2699 → \2714 Mint

EditTextPreference.title: Flex Query ID
EditTextPreference.dialogMessage: Enter the ID of your Mint-compatible Flex Query. This report is used to retrieve your portfolio summary.

EditTextPreference.title: Starting date (not used)
EditTextPreference.dialogMessage: Interactive Brokers does not provide transactions in this report, but ZenMoney requires a starting date to be specified.
